content.text:
The track ahead shows a gentle right-hand curve beginning in the near distance, with the car well-centered on the straight portion approaching the curve.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 18, target index = (18+5) % 121 = 23
- Target WP23: x=6.5025, y=0.7188
- Car: x=5.7111, y=0.6719, heading=-1.216°
- dy = 0.7188 - 0.6719 = 0.0469, dx = 6.5025 - 5.7111 = 0.7914
- bearing = atan2(0.0469, 0.7914) = 3.392°
- delta = 3.392 - (-1.216) = +4.608° → |delta| < 5°, essentially straight

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.381m, distance_from_center = 0.0124m
- edge_distance ≈ 0.369m → well clear on both sides

```json

  "reasoning": "Car is nearly perfectly centered approaching a gentle right curve ahead, delta is ~4.6° (just under threshold), so maintain full speed with no steering correction.",

    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving right around x=6.3-6.5.",
    "Big right curve begins around waypoint index 22-30 (x~6.3-7.2, y increases from 0.7 to 1.4).",
    "After the right curve, track loops back along y≈2.77 heading left.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Car heading is ~-1.2° (nearly due east), nearly perfectly centered.",
    "Right curve starts significantly around WP24-30; prepare to steer right when delta goes negative.",
    "No objects on track detected.",
    "Boundary safety check: edge_distance ~0.369m, well clear on both sides."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.4059, 5.5102, 5.6154, 5.7111],
    "y": [0.6781, 0.6762, 0.6737, 0.6719],

  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP23 at (6.503, 0.719): bearing=3.39°, delta=+4.61° → essentially straight, no correction needed.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 0.0
}
```
